false_positives.what_happened: tinyexr bundles miniz (zlib-compatible) under deps/miniz/, and tinyexr.h also embeds a copy of miniz inflate/deflate routines. The cross-file hits are two copies of the SAME vendored miniz library (one standalone, one inlined into the header) -- third-party code, not author copypaste.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: vendoring filter for deps/** and recognized bundled libs (miniz); also low line-similarity (0.30-0.50) here reflects partial vendored overlap.

note: Two copies of vendored miniz (deps/ + inlined in tinyexr.h). Vendored. sccs=0.
